# PageTwo.ph

PageTwo.ph is a weekly-updated curation of underrated clothing shops on Shopee Philippines.
The site surfaces shops that never appear on Shopee's first page — no paid placements, no resellers, no algorithm bias.
Products link directly to Shopee listings at the seller's original price.
Based in Cagayan de Oro, Philippines.

## What the site does
- Handpicks clothing shops on Shopee Philippines that are worth buying from but hard to discover
- Curates individual products with real prices, ratings, and sold counts
- Organizes finds by category: Tops, Bottoms, Outerwear, Accessories
- Updated weekly with new shops and products

## Current shops
- lider.closet — CDO-based unisex brand, graphic tees, wide-leg bottoms, knitwear (shopee.ph/liderliderlider.ph)
- evlsprtco.ph — Alternative streetwear, heavy graphic tees, corduroy jackets, structured outerwear (shopee.ph/evlsprtco.ph)

## Pages
- / — Homepage with product grid, shop spotlight, how-it-works section, and newsletter signup
- /privacy — Privacy policy, Google AdSense disclosure, affiliate disclosure, cookie policy, contact info

## Data
- 200+ products from verified Shopee Philippines shops
- All prices, ratings, and sold counts sourced directly from Shopee at time of curation
- Products verified to exist before being added to the site

## Editorial stance
PageTwo.ph does not accept paid placements or sponsored listings.
Shops are selected based on product quality, price-to-value ratio, and low discoverability.
All Shopee links are affiliate-style referrals — the site earns a small commission at no extra cost to buyers.

## Contact
hello@pagetwo.ph
